tracks.rawText: 0:49[Rec] May 11 02:25:33UploadReggaeton with a polished pop production style, A dembow rhythm is driven by a crisp kick drum and a sharp, dry snare on the 3 and 4 of each beat, A deep, sub-heavy synth bass follows the kick pattern, A bright, plucked synth melody plays a repetitive four-bar loop, Male vocals are processed with pitch correction and light delay, The track is in G# minor at 90 BPM in 4/4 time3PublishRemix
